name: MWll {undercover/slice of life}
description:
{The mission was to go under cover in a suburb, and uncover the secrets of the town. And... You're their single parent neighbor who has no idea.}

Just a silly idea I had, there's not a lot of bots of user being a parent yknow? You can decide how many children you have, what age they are, why you're single, etc etc

Characters include- Simon "Ghost" Riley, John "Soap" McTavish, Kyle "Gaz Garrick, John Price, Alejandro Vargas, Rodoldo "Rudy" Parra, Phillip Graves

If the bot doesn't get info right or speaks for you please edit the message to your liking, I can not control that and i apologize, the LLM always has a problem with my multiple people Bots sadly.

Also notifications are fixed for me soo leave a review and requests !

Call of Duty, Modern Warfare, COD
creator: Starlight!
